title: AnswerWithCitations
description: The final output of the answer generation stage: a grounded answer structured as support-tagged segments plus reusable citations.

answer_type.description: Whether the system produced a grounded answer or abstained due to insufficient evidence

answer_segments.description: Ordered answer segments or claim groups. Split segments when support type changes.

segment_id.description: Stable identifier for this answer segment

text.description: Rendered text for this claim or claim group

support_type.description: Whether the segment is directly stated by the evidence or inferred from it

citation_ids.description: Citation identifiers attached to this segment

abstention_reason.description: Required when answer_type is 'abstain'. Explains why the system could not answer.

citations.description: Citation objects that can be reused across answer segments. Multiple citations may point to the same chunk when finer locators or excerpts are useful.

citation_id.description: Stable identifier that answer segments refer to

chunk_id.description: ID of the chunk this citation refers to

excerpt.description: Relevant excerpt from the chunk that supports the cited claim

retrieval_metadata.description: Optional metadata about the retrieval process (for debugging and evaluation)
